patch.value: Single-source extension capability and policy-surface contract lists

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: the repo static quality gate with --duplicate-window 10 found extension contract arrays duplicated between src/core/extensions/extension-types.ts and src/sdk/cli-contracts.ts. Representative clones are KNOWN_EXTENSION_CAPABILITIES vs PM_EXTENSION_CAPABILITY_CONTRACTS at extension-types.ts:4-14 and cli-contracts.ts:45-55, KNOWN_EXTENSION_POLICY_MODES/TRUST/SANDBOX vs PM_EXTENSION_*_CONTRACTS at extension-types.ts:27-32 and cli-contracts.ts:72-77, and KNOWN_EXTENSION_POLICY_SURFACES vs PM_EXTENSION_POLICY_SURFACE_CONTRACTS at extension-types.ts:34-55 and cli-contracts.ts:79-100. Search found closed SDK typing/docs work and open pm-axd1 for policy default objects, but no active item for single-sourcing the core-vs-SDK contract constants. Fix by exporting one canonical contract source or generating the SDK aliases from the core source so extension capabilities/surfaces/modes cannot drift.

Extension capabilities, policy modes, trust modes, sandbox profiles, and policy surfaces have one canonical source; SDK-facing exported names remain backward-compatible or are generated aliases; core governance and contracts command output continue to expose the same values; focused extension contracts tests and pnpm build pass.

value.author: codex-duplication-audit
value.text: Evidence: duplicate-check searches before creation included 'duplicate duplicated duplication repeated copy-paste code logic tests text', 'Deduplicate', and 'extension types sdk cli contracts command option action service duplicate'. Existing pm-axd1 covers extension governance policy default objects, and closed SDK items cover typing/docs, but no active item covered the duplicated core-vs-SDK contract lists. Static scan evidence: node scripts/release/static-quality-gate.mjs --duplicate-window 10 --max-duplicate-chunks 200 --json reported extension-types.ts vs cli-contracts.ts clones for capabilities, policy modes, sandbox profiles, and policy surfaces.

author: codex-dedupe-agent
message: Start code dedupe implementation for extension capability/policy contract lists; combining with related extension policy defaults work in one PR.

value.author: codex-code-dedupe-lane
value.text: Evidence from code-duplication lane: read-only investigation only; no source edits. Inspected src/core/extensions/extension-types.ts, src/sdk/cli-contracts.ts, src/core/shared/constants.ts, src/core/extensions/loader.ts, tests/unit/extension-loader.spec.ts. Finding: extension capability/mode/surface lists are duplicated between src/core/extensions/extension-types.ts:4-55 and src/sdk/cli-contracts.ts:45-100, while loader consumes the core lists at src/core/extensions/loader.ts:11-18 and contracts output consumes the SDK aliases at src/cli/commands/contracts.ts:1708-1714. Safest single-source approach: keep src/core/extensions/extension-types.ts as canonical, import KNOWN_EXTENSION_CAPABILITIES, KNOWN_EXTENSION_POLICY_MODES, KNOWN_EXTENSION_TRUST_MODES, KNOWN_EXTENSION_SANDBOX_PROFILES, and KNOWN_EXTENSION_POLICY_SURFACES into src/sdk/cli-contracts.ts, and preserve existing exported names by deriving PM_EXTENSION_*_CONTRACTS from copied spreads of those canonical tuples. Use copied arrays, not direct aliases, to preserve prior runtime mutability/isolation of the SDK exports while removing literal drift. Service names are also duplicated: ExtensionServiceName union at extension-types.ts:299-307, PM_EXTENSION_SERVICE_NAME_CONTRACTS at cli-contracts.ts:59-68, and loader private EXTENSION_SERVICE_NAMES at loader.ts:1621-1630. Recommend adding KNOWN_EXTENSION_SERVICE_NAMES in extension-types.ts, deriving ExtensionServiceName from it, deriving PM_EXTENSION_SERVICE_NAME_CONTRACTS from it, and replacing loader private literal with the canonical list. Focused verification run: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/extension-loader.spec.ts tests/unit/contracts-command.spec.ts tests/unit/settings-store.spec.ts tests/unit/shared-constants-errors.spec.ts => 4 files passed, 73 tests passed. Static evidence: rg found all duplicate symbols; npx -y jscpd over the scoped files completed and reported only small intra-file interface-shape clones in extension-types.ts, not the cross-file literal-list duplication.

patch.value: loader service-name validation uses canonical service tuple
